entry.title: Julien added 'Kids, Wait Till You Hear This!'
entry.content: 📚 “Kids, Wait Till You Hear This!” by Liza Minnelli ⭐️ Rated: 4/5 📝 "An all-around surprisingly honest autobiography, told in her own voice and tone. Liza Minnelli doesn’t seem to hide much in this candid account, even if one suspects she may have left a few things for the unauthorized biography that will inevitably come one day. It’s a swift yet surprisingly deep read, revealing a true trooper, resilient, complex, and unwavering in the face of it all. ⸻ Une autobiographie étonnamment honnête, racontée avec sa propre voix et son ton singulier. Liza Minnelli ne se..." 🏷️ #LizaMinnelli

entry.title: Julien is 87% done with Kids, Wait Till You Hear
entry.content: 📈 I’ve read 87% of “Kids, Wait Till You Hear This!” by Liza Minnelli ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░ 87.00% 🔗 Progress: https://www.goodreads.com/user/show/14857928-julien 🏷️ #LizaMinnelli #ReadingProgress

entry.title: Julien added 'This 'n That'
entry.content: 📚 “This 'n That” by Bette Davis ⭐️ Rated: 2/5 📝 "A strangely constructed autobiography, written after Davies’ stroke. It has its good moments, especially when the actress recalls her time on movie sets, but also some odd choices, like a full chapter written by and about her personal assistant. A very thin book, somewhat satisfying, yet not quite complete. ——— Une autobiographie construite de manière étrange, écrite après l’AVC de Davies. Elle comporte de bons moments, notamment lorsque l’actrice raconte ses souvenirs de tournage, mais aussi de..." 🏷️ #BetteDavis
